ipc_commands.start_runtime: Spawns backend binary, returns RuntimeInfo { pid, port, status, session_token }
ipc_commands.stop_runtime: Kills process by PID with memory cleanup
ipc_commands.get_runtime_status: Returns RuntimeStatus { running, pid, port, healthy }
ipc_commands.run_agent: Accepts task JSON, returns AgentResult { run_id, status, result, elapsed }

runtime_client.pattern: real invoke() + MockAdapter for test isolation

fixed_tests.test_ipc_token_rotation.ts: Uses MockAdapter — no Tauri IPC dependency

thresholds.rust_build: Scaffold complete — requires Rust toolchain for cargo build

acceptance.notes: P1 RUST BRIDGE complete. src-tauri/ structure with 6 files, 5 IPC commands, real invoke() bindings, 15 bridge tests passing. CORE FREEZE maintained throughout.
